question:
Yumpuses are floral. Each yumpus is a vumpus. Vumpuses are not temperate. Vumpuses are jompuses. Jompuses are not dull. Impuses are not spicy. Jompuses are numpuses. Numpuses are not opaque. Each numpus is a wumpus. Every wumpus is amenable. Wumpuses are rompuses. Each rompus is not red. Rompuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are spicy. Every tumpus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are shy. Each dumpus is a zumpus. Rex is a jompus.

Is the following statement true or false? Rex is not spicy.
